description_long: This is a futuristic, stylized airplane with a sleek, angular design and a predominantly blue and gray color scheme accented by green and white. The wings are long, straight, and extend outward with sharp, pointed tips, featuring detailed panel lines and markings. The fuselage is streamlined and tapers to a pointed nose, with a green central section and a cockpit area integrated smoothly into the body. The tail section is compact, with vertical stabilizers and additional fin-like structures, giving it a high-tech, agile appearance. Visible engine components are mounted at the rear, suggesting a jet propulsion system. The overall design is reminiscent of advanced fighter or reconnaissance aircraft, with a focus on speed and maneuverability.
description: A sleek, futuristic blue and gray airplane with long, pointed wings, a streamlined green fuselage, and detailed high-tech features. The design emphasizes agility and advanced aerodynamics.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, detailed wing structure, and visible engine components at the rear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow, pointed nose, wide wingspan, and slim profile of the airplane.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wing and tail fin details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin engine mounts, tail fins, and the overall symmetry of the airplane's design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with long, straight wings featuring sharp, pointed tips and slight anhedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional tailplane and additional fin-like structures.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with visible main and nose gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit integrated smoothly into the fuselage with a streamlined canopy.
